chunk_text: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi) Telugu Title: పీఎం-కిసాన్ (ప్రధాన మంత్రి కిసాన్ సమ్మాన్ నిధి) Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

Benefit Amount: ₹6,000 per year per family in three equal installments of ₹2,000 each, deposited every 4 months via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT). 100% Central Government funding. Maximum landholding: up to 2 hectares cultivable land. Apply details URL: https://pmkisan.gov.in
Minimum Age: 18 Maximum Age: 110 Annual income cap: ₹999999 Requires Land: true
Documents checklist: - Aadhaar Card - Land Records / Patta Passbook - Bank Account Passbook - Mobile Number
